allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add research-backed Cyclic Sighing technique and update all breathing programs with clinical evidence

- Add Cyclic Sighing \(double inhale + extended exhale\) based on Stanford RCT
  \(Balban et al., 2023\) showing superior anxiety reduction vs mindfulness
- Add DEEP_INHALE breath phase for the second "sip" inhale
- Update Box Breathing default from 4 to 19 rounds \(~5 min\) per systematic
  review finding <5 min sessions are 67% ineffective
- Update Power Breathing default from 3 to 30 rounds matching standard
  Wim Hof 30-breath protocol \(Kox et al., PNAS 2014\)
- Add science field to all protocols with concise mechanism, evidence,
  and physiological effect descriptions
- Display "How it works" section in Session setup page
- Raise round cap from 20 to 40 to accommodate new defaults

Co-Authored-By: Claude \(claude-opus-4-6\) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Make breathing session fully immersive with visual round progress

- Raise session overlay z-index above header \(z-60 > z-50\) so the
  header is completely hidden during active sessions
- Replace text "Round X of Y" with a segmented progress bar:
  - ≤20 rounds: individual segments that light up as rounds complete
  - >20 rounds: continuous bar with a compact round counter
- Segments use technique-specific gradient colors with a subtle glow
  on completed rounds

Co-Authored-By: Claude \(claude-opus-4-6\) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add distinct favicons for Chatbot and Breathwork apps

- Chatbot: gradient chat bubble with three dots on dark background,
  using the portfolio purple/violet accent \(#7c8aff → #a78bfa\)
- Breathwork: glowing orb with subtle wave motif on dark background,
  using the indigo accent \(#6366F1 → #818CF8\)
- Add useFavicon hook that dynamically swaps the favicon based on
  the current route \(/breathwork → breath, everything else → chat\)
- Remove old vite.svg placeholder favicon

Co-Authored-By: Claude \(claude-opus-4-6\) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix unused import/variable and add typecheck script

- Remove unused `techniqueProgressStyle` import and `progress`
  variable left behind when the progress bar was replaced
- Add `npm run typecheck` script using `tsc -b` which resolves
  project references and enforces noUnusedLocals/noUnusedParameters

Co-Authored-By: Claude \(claude-opus-4-6\) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix iOS flickering caused by compositing and layout thrashing

- Add translateZ\(0\) to fixed elements with backdrop-filter \(Header,
  Navigation, BreathworkLayout, noise overlay\) to isolate them on
  their own GPU compositor layers
- Add will-change to all animated CSS elements \(stars, breath-orbs,
  orb floats, pulse-breath, float, breath-gradient\)
- Replace transition-all with specific properties on 6 glass/card
  classes to prevent iOS from transitioning backdrop-filter and
  box-shadow on hover
- Refactor FluidOrb to use transform: scale\(\) instead of animating
  width/height, avoiding layout recalculation on every frame
- Add explicit willChange and translateZ\(0\) to all FluidOrb layers
- Remove unnecessary transition-colors on static breath-bg div

Co-Authored-By: Claude \(claude-opus-4-6\) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
